case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. GERARDO ENRIQUE DOMINQUEZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $721.53 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINQUEZ HERNANDEZ, GERARDO ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAR-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINQUEZ HERNANDEZ, GERARDO ENRIQUE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINQUEZ HERNANDEZ, GERARDO ENRIQUE $721.53 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $796.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
